title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Cuthaean Legend of Naram-Sin
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Cuthaean Legend of Naram-Sin.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Cuthaean Legend of Naram-Sin.

translation.text: From 'Cuthaean Legend of Naram-Sin': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
